heading: Wednesday Night
text: Increasing clouds. Chance of an evening shower or thunderstorm, then showers likely and maybe a thunderstorm after midnight. Lows mainly in the mid to upper 50s, some lower 50s northeast, and around 60 in the Champlain Valley. South winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Thursday
text: Mostly cloudy. Showers likely, becoming scattered west of the Greens in the afternoon; severe thunderstorms possible. Highs in the mid to upper 70s, some lower 70s northeast and in the Adirondacks. South to southeast winds 10 to 20 mph, gusting 45 to 55 mph, and becoming southwest in the afternoon.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Scattered showers and thunderstorms east of the Greens, chance west, all mainly in the evening. Lows from the mid 50s to around 60. Southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 35 mph early in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.
